title: DMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 37 Supervisor, Manager and More Posts
shortInfo: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) Manager/Assistant Manager/Supervisor (Electrical) Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website delhimetrorail.com. A total of 37 vacancies have been announced through the DMRC Manager/Assistant Manager/Supervisor (Electrical) Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 55 and 62 years who have relevant experience in the Electrical department and meet the qualification criteria are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The offline application process for DMRC Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 28 May 2026. Can

basic_details.job_title: DMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 37 Supervisor, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) Manager/Assistant Manager/Supervisor (Electrical) Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website delhimetrorail.com. A total of 37 vacancies have been announced through the DMRC Manager/Assistant Manager/Supervisor (Electrical) Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 55 and 62 years who have relevant experience in the Electrical department and meet the qualification criteria are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The offline application process for DMRC Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 28 May 2026. Can

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 55 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age relaxation is not mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Indian Nationality, Experience in Electrical department (Traction / Rolling Stock / E&M / General Services), Working or retired from Central/State Govt / Railways / PSUs / Metro organizations, Free from D&AR and Vigilance angle, Conversant with computerized working environment
qualification.details: Indian Nationality. Experience in Electrical department (Traction / Rolling Stock / E&M / General Services). Working or retired from Central/State Govt / Railways / PSUs / Metro organizations. Free from D&AR and Vigilance angle. Conversant with computerized working environment. Manager (Electrical) / Assistant Manager (Electrical): 5 years Gazetted/Executive experience in Electrical department from Govt/Railways/PSUs/Metros. Supervisor/Electrical (SSE/SE/JE): 5 years supervisory experience in Electrical department from Govt/Railways/PSUs/Metros.

selection_process: Shortlisting Personal Interview Medical Examination (for PRCE)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.delhimetrorail.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for DMRC Recruitment 2026 is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 37 vacancies announced for Manager/Assistant Manager/Supervisor (Electrical) posts in DMRC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for DMRC Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to DMRC posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 55 years and a maximum of 62 years as of 01-05-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these DMRC positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Manager/Assistant Manager/Supervisor (Electrical) posts ranges from Rs. 56,300 to Rs. 1,06,300 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the eligibility criteria for DMRC Manager/Assistant Manager (Electrical) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have 5 years of Gazetted/Executive experience in the Electrical department from government, railways, PSUs, or metro organizations.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications, followed by a personal interview and a medical examination for PRCE.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for DMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) at http://www.delhimetrorail.com.
